WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

 Formula guardedness
====================

  Lemma `L' cannot be converted to a guarded formula:
    unguarded variable(s) 'x' in the subformula
      "∃ x. ∀ #i. (A( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (C( x ) @ #i)"
    in the formula
      "∃ x. ∀ #i. (A( x ) @ #i) ⇒ (C( x ) @ #i)"
*/
